name: AI COO — 30-Day Optimization Call Reminder

trigger.description: Fires when a client receives the active-client tag (immediately after Closed Won workflow step 2)

config.note: 28 days — gives 2 days buffer before the 30-day mark

config.message: Hey {{contact.firstName}}, your 30-day AI COO optimization call is coming up! Let's review what's working and tune the system. Book here: {{OPTIMIZATION_CALENDAR_LINK}}

config.subject: Your 30-day optimization call — let's review your AI COO System

config.title: Manual follow-up: {{contact.firstName}} hasn't booked optimization call

config.note: This step listens for the booking event and tags them so retainer upsell can be offered on the call

notes: The optimization call is where you upsell the monthly retainer ($297–$497/mo). Make sure to prepare a brief review of their system metrics before the call. The manual task in step 6 ensures no client falls through without a human touchpoint.
